title: server/jobtracker
description: The server/jobtracker directory is responsible for managing the JobTracker server-level configuration. It contains a single file, JTConfig.java, which serves as a placeholder for the server-level configuration. The directory does not contain any core logic, inputs/outputs, or dependencies. The JTConfig.java file does not contain any specific functionality, but it provides a centralized location for storing and managing the JobTracker server-level configuration.
